overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character standing on an elevated industrial walkway during a rainy night. The camera slowly pans right across a neon-lit urban environment, revealing the illuminated Queen Industries building and surrounding cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway overlooking city plaza

events.description: camera begins slow pan to the right from stationary position behind Batman

agents.ego_description: Batman stands motionless on an elevated walkway, gripping the glass railing while surveying the rain-soaked city below

entered.detail: wet metal grating floor of the elevated walkway with rain droplets visible
transparent glass railing with metal frame running along the walkway edge
illuminated purple neon light strips running along the ceiling structure
tall cylindrical glass elevator structure with internal lighting visible
complex network of exposed metal beams and girders supporting the building structure
open plaza area visible below the walkway with scattered pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an elevated industrial walkway at night during rainfall, sheltered under a metal overhang. The camera begins a slow pan to the right, revealing neon purple lighting strips along the ceiling and a glass elevator shaft to the left. Below, the city plaza is visible with sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with view of Queen Industries headquarters

events.description: camera pans right to reveal the illuminated Queen Industries building with prominent signage

agents.ego_description: Batman remains stationary, now facing toward the Queen Industries building as the camera completes its panoramic sweep

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza below near the Queen Industries entrance

entered.detail: triangular glass facade building with illuminated 'Queen Industries' signage and teal accent lighting at the base
industrial metal staircase with open risers connecting different walkway levels

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the Queen Industries building comes into full view with its distinctive triangular architecture and glowing signage. The walkway elements shift to the left of the frame while the neon lighting moves toward center. A pedestrian is visible walking across the plaza below near the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan from a sheltered industrial vantage point across a rain-slicked, neon-lit urban landscape. It begins with Batman standing under a metal overhang on an elevated walkway, where purple neon strips line the ceiling and a glass elevator shaft stands to the left. As the camera glides to the right, the perspective shifts away from the industrial architecture to reveal a city plaza below with sparse pedestrian activity. The scene then expands to bring the Queen Industries building into full view, highlighting its distinctive triangular architecture and glowing signage. Finally, the walkway elements recede to the edge of the frame as the focus settles on the illuminated corporate tower and a lone pedestrian crossing the plaza near its entrance.
